products.name: blueMoat
products.description: Prior-art screening you can defend. Paste a disclosure and get a screened landscape where every finding carries a validated source quote, an independent second opinion, and a tamper-evident receipt. Built for founders, IP counsel, and diligence teams who need answers that hold up.

products.name: blueCheck
products.description: Receipts for AI work. A developer kit that wraps any AI call and returns the answer with a signed record for the audit trail.
products.description_after: Buyer: engineering and compliance leaders shipping AI features.

products.name: blueChart
products.description: Better appeals. Better audit trail. No autonomous denials. Health-plan utilization management decision support that strengthens human review instead of replacing it — every determination ships with its evidence. Buyer: Chief Medical Officer / VP Clinical Operations.

products.name: blueSentinal
products.description: Catches AI at its most dangerous moment: confidently wrong.
products.description_after: Buyer: teams running AI inside decisions that matter.

products.name: blueProof
products.description: Prove what your model is. Turns a trained decision model into evidence regulators can read — built for filings, validations, and examinations. Buyer: chief actuaries and model risk leaders.

products.name: blueClaims
products.description: Faster claim closure, defensible claim files — insurance adjudication with audit trails that survive litigation.

products.name: blueRelay
products.description: Verified AI infrastructure for regulated enterprises.

products.name: blueCredit
products.description: Lending models with examination-ready evidence, end to end.

products.name: blueLens
products.description: AI compliance oversight for regulated industries.

products.name: blueDocket
products.description: Continuous prior-art watch for patent practices — the screening your team does by hand, running around the clock on every active matter.

products.name: blueScreen
products.description: Sanctions screening that justifies its own dispositions and drains the false-positive queue.

products.name: blueGuard
products.description: AML evidence packets — every decision arrives with the deliberation examiners want to see.
